appName.description: Extension display name shown in the Chrome toolbar and extensions list.

appDesc.message: AI 채팅 대화를 로컬 Markdown/PDF 파일로 백업합니다. ChatGPT부터 지원.
appDesc.description: Extension description shown in the Chrome Web Store and extensions list.

downloadMdLabel.description: Label for the Markdown export button.

downloadPdfLabel.description: Label for the PDF export button.

downloadJsonLabel.description: Label for the JSON export button.

downloadHtmlLabel.description: Label for the HTML export button.

downloadMdAriaLabel.description: Accessible name for the Markdown export button.

downloadPdfAriaLabel.description: Accessible name for the PDF export button.

downloadJsonAriaLabel.description: Accessible name for the JSON export button.

downloadHtmlAriaLabel.description: Accessible name for the HTML export button.

exportNoAdapterMessage.message: 이 페이지는 지원되는 대화가 아니어서 내보낼 내용이 없습니다.
exportNoAdapterMessage.description: Shown when the current page is not a recognized conversation.

exportFailedMessage.message: 대화를 내보내지 못했습니다. 다시 시도해 주세요.
exportFailedMessage.description: Generic fallback for an unexpected export failure.

exportEmptyMessage.message: 이 대화에는 메시지가 없어 내보낼 내용이 없습니다.
exportEmptyMessage.description: Shown when extraction returns a conversation with no messages.

downloadBulkLabel.description: Label for the toolbar button that opens the bulk-export panel.

downloadBulkAriaLabel.description: Accessible name for the bulk-export toolbar button.

bulkPanelTitle.description: Title of the bulk-export selection panel.

bulkPanelFormatLabel.description: Label for the format picker in the bulk-export panel.

bulkPanelSelectAll.description: Select-all control in the bulk-export panel.

bulkPanelCancel.description: Cancel button in the bulk-export panel.

bulkPanelClose.description: Close button in the bulk-export panel.

bulkEmptyMessage.description: Shown when the history sidebar lists no conversations.

bulkUnsupportedMessage.message: 이 페이지에서는 일괄 내보내기를 사용할 수 없습니다.
bulkUnsupportedMessage.description: Shown when the current page's adapter does not support bulk export.

bulkExportButtonLabel.description: Export-button label with the current selected count.

bulkProgressMessage.description: In-progress line shown while a batch runs.

bulkSummarySaved.description: Final summary line after a batch: how many succeeded.

bulkSummaryFailed.description: Appended to the summary line when some exports failed.

optionsTitle.description: Browser-tab title of the options page.

optionsHeading.description: Visible heading of the options page.

optionsFormatsLabel.description: Label above the format checklist on the options page.

optionsBulkLabel.description: Label for the bulk-icon toggle on the options page.

optionsSavedNote.description: Transient confirmation shown after a setting change is saved.

optionsSaveFailedNote.description: Shown when persisting a setting change to storage fails.

optionsMinFormatNote.message: 최소 한 개의 내보내기 형식은 켜져 있어야 합니다.
optionsMinFormatNote.description: Shown when the user tries to uncheck the last remaining format.
